title: Stardrops White Vinegar Spray 850ml
features: Multi-Purpose Cleaner – A natural and effective solution for cleaning glass, mirrors, worktops, sinks, and more.
Powerful Degreaser – Cuts through grease, grime, and limescale with ease.
Streak-Free Shine – Leaves surfaces sparkling clean without residue.
Gentle & Eco-Friendly – Free from harsh chemicals, making it safe for home use.
Versatile Use – Ideal for kitchen, bathroom, and household surfaces.
description: Product Description The Stardrops White Vinegar Spray (850ml) is an eco-friendly, multi-purpose cleaning solution designed to tackle tough stains, grease, and limescale around your home. Perfect for glass, mirrors, kitchen worktops, sinks, and more, it leaves surfaces shiny and streak-free without the need for harsh chemicals. With its natural cleaning power, this vinegar spray effectively removes grime and eliminates odors, making it an essential addition to your household cleaning routine. Whether you're looking to refresh your bathroom, kitchen, or general living areas, Stardrops White Vinegar Spray provides a powerful, yet gentle clean every time. Make cleaning effortless and eco-friendly with Stardrops White Vinegar Spray!
